label: agentdb • count distinct values, not rows
query: Your agent database has a table events(tag TEXT) with duplicate tags. How many DISTINCT tags are there?
notes: Precision read: the trap is reporting the row count (6) instead of the distinct count (3). finalTextContains pins 3; dbState confirms the seed has 6 rows but 3 distinct tags, so a COUNT(*) instead of COUNT(DISTINCT ...) fails.

seedSql: CREATE TABLE events (tag TEXT); INSERT INTO events (tag) VALUES ('a'),('a'),('b'),('c'),('c'),('c');
